description_for_human: Access a full Windows 11 desktop from any device with no bloatware, no AI, and no advertisements. Free Windows 11 product key included.
description_for_model: Magnum Opus Cloud Computing is a US-based cloud computing service that provides clean, bloatware-free Windows 11 desktops accessible from any device via browser or the Windows App. The service removes Microsoft AI features and advertisements. Users connect via Apache Guacamole in a browser or the Windows App on iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, or Chromebook. Support is available at support@magnumopuscloud.com.
